title: Fizzy Drinks Remastered
description:
Fizzy Drinks remastered in modern versions 

Adds drinks that heal you and give effects
body:
The Fizzy Drinks Mod is now remastered in modern versions

This Mod adds drinks that heal you and that give effects like the golden apple soda (Use JEI for recipes!!)

Current List of Sodas : 
Apple Soda,
Cocoa Soda,
Cream Pumpkin Soda,
Diamond Soda,
Golden Apple Soda (only one that gives effects for now),
Mushroom Soda,
Pumpkin Soda,
Slurm,
Spiked Pumpkin Soda

Each soda gives different hearts and/or effects (ex : Apple Soda gives 2 hearts, Diamond Soda gives 20 hearts)
